Artist Bio
The Soul Behind the Sound

As a singer, songwriter, and instrumentalist, Jeff Monk's music is an introspective journey through the human experience. His lyrics are poignant and introspective, often drawing from personal experiences and universal themes of love, loss, and self-discovery. His soulful voice carries a raw, emotive quality that resonates deeply with his audience.

One of Jeff's defining qualities is his ability to connect with his listeners on a profound level. His songs are not just melodies; they are stories, emotions, and life experiences set to music. Whether performing in an intimate acoustic setting or commanding a large stage with his band, Jeff has an uncanny ability to create a sense of intimacy and connection with his audience.

Beyond his artistic endeavors, Jeff Monk is a philanthropist who believes in the transformative power of music. He is involved in various charitable initiatives, using his talent to raise awareness and funds for causes close to his heart.

In the ever-evolving world of music, Jeff Monk is an artist who continually pushes boundaries, challenges conventions, and invites us to explore the depths of our emotions through his music. With each composition and performance, he offers a glimpse into his soul, leaving an indelible mark on the hearts and minds of those fortunate enough to experience his artistry.

Jeff Monk's music is a testament to the enduring power of sound to inspire, heal, and move the human spirit.

♦ Supporting Those Who Serve ♦

A portion of proceeds from Jeff's music go directly to The Marine Raider Foundation, supporting veterans and families of MARSOC — the United States Marine Corps' Special Operations Command. Jeff has two sons currently serving in combat assignments with the United States Marine Corps.

Learn more at marineraiderfoundation.org →

On Stage
Live Performances

New Album

Echoes

For Echoes, Jeff worked with 2-time Grammy winning producer Matt Leigh — known for his work with Willie Nelson, Kenny Chesney, Deep Purple, Keb Mo and many more. The music was recorded at the legendary Sound Emporium's Studio A and vocals were recorded at Starstruck Studios on Music Row in Nashville, TN.

Featured Session Musicians

Tim Galloway — Guitar (ACM Guitar Player of the Year · Bailey Zimmerman, Gary Allan, Luke Bryan, Keith Urban)
Mike Hicks — Piano & Keys (Rascal Flatts, Keb Mo, Robben Ford)
Sam Hunter — Guitar (George Strait, Jason Aldean, Willie Nelson, Ronnie Milsap)
Shaun Richardson — Guitar (Ricky Skaggs, Dailey & Vincent, Sierra Hull)
Kyle May — Drums (Billy Ray Cyrus, Lynyrd Skynyrd, Clay Walker)

Sound & Visuals

Jeff Monk delivers a high-energy, professional performance with a setlist spanning over 100 songs — from Red Dirt and Texas Country to Southern Rock and classic favorites from the 80s, 90s, and 2000s. Every show features the highest quality of sound production and visuals, creating an unforgettable experience for any crowd.

With over 120 live shows under his belt, Jeff brings a seasoned stage presence and the ability to read and connect with any audience — whether it's an intimate acoustic evening or a full band festival set.

Press
What Critics Are Saying
Music & Entertainers Magazine

"Carry On shuts in a powerful and hopeful message for individuals who have faced and triumphed over trauma. The song's moving significance goes deeply, reminding us that we have the strength to persevere and overcome any obstacles that come our way."

New Music Release Radar

"In the world of independent music, Jeff Monk stands out with his raw and unfiltered writing style. His latest release, 'Carry On,' encompasses clear and hard-hitting lyrics, accompanied by powerful arrangements that amplify the emotive messages within the songs."

ReverbNation Review

"Echoes is definitely one of the better songs I've heard from an independent artist on Reverbnation. I absolutely loved the overall vibe and think this artist has great potential."
